overview: ICSnap is a Snapchat-like app for the Internet Computer with camera-first UX, single-view snaps, chat, and a snap editor with text and drawing tools.
features: Send photos as snaps that can only be viewed once
Snap editor with text overlays: customizable font, color, size, pinch-to-scale, rotation with snap assist
Snap editor with freehand drawing: multiple colors and stroke widths
Chat list shows new message indicator (purple icon) and snap indicator (yellow)
Find contacts by username or Principal ID
